widgets.name: calculator
widgets.description: A pure, fully self-contained widget: no bindings, no capabilities, no data requests. Everything happens client-side with plain event listeners.

widgets.name: habit-tracker
widgets.description: A rolling 7-day check-in grid: tap a day to mark the habit done, watch the current streak update, and rename the habit inline — all persisted across reloads via the…

widgets.name: hello-data
widgets.description: Minimal example: requests one static binding (greeting) with dashboard:getData on load, and re-renders on both the dashboard:data reply and any later dashboard:push.

widgets.name: notes
widgets.description: A scratchpad widget — and a deliberately honest example of the current persistence gap.

widgets.name: pomodoro
widgets.description: A focus timer with work/break cycles, a depleting countdown ring, configurable durations, and a completed-session counter — the second starter that persists its state across…

widgets.name: twenty48
widgets.description: A compact 2048 tile game showing off state:persist — best score and board survive a reload.
